title: Alerts
subtitle: Rules-based alerting for sessions, agents, events, and token usage

ruleTypeHints.event_pattern: Fires when an ingested event matches the pattern. Set a count above 1 to require N matching events within a time window (e.g. more than 5 errors in 2 minutes).
ruleTypeHints.inactivity: Fires when an active session has received no events for the configured number of minutes.
ruleTypeHints.status_duration: Fires when an agent has remained in the selected status with no activity for the configured number of minutes.
ruleTypeHints.token_threshold: Fires when a session's total token usage (input + output + cache) exceeds the threshold.

rules.title: Alert rules
rules.empty: No alert rules yet. Add one to start monitoring for stuck agents, error bursts, idle sessions, or token spikes.
rules.confirmDelete: Delete rule "{{name}}" and its alert history?

feed.title: Alert feed
feed.emptyDescription: Alerts fired by your rules will appear here in real time.
feed.emptyUnacked: Everything is acknowledged. New alerts will appear here as they fire.
